name: Relaxing Massage
description: Rhythmic and mesmerizing, this massage style uses gentle flowing strokes to increase circulation and relieve tension in the body. Warm towels and essential oils are infused into the session aiding the relaxation process and to create a sense of wellbeing.
short_description: Gentle flowing strokes to melt away tension and restore calm

name: Therapeutic Massage
description: Specific injuries and chronic problem areas are attended to in this treatment. Your therapist applies the myofascial release techniques needed for your ailment in varying pressures to relieve pain, improve range of motion in target areas and help you get back to your best self. Hot towels are used to help soothe sore muscles along with the scent of essential oils to calm the mind.
short_description: Targeted bodywork for injuries and chronic tension

name: Deep Tissue Massage
description: This bodywork penetrates into the deepest layers of muscle and connective tissue addressing soreness, pain and muscle damage. Firm pressure is applied with specific myofascial techniques to release tightness in the muscle tissue, ligaments and joints. Heated towels and essential oils specific to the ailment compliment this curative modality. It's not uncommon for clients to feel sore for a day or two after a deep tissue massage. However, this soreness is a natural response and indicates that the body is healing. Drinking plenty of water post-massage can help flush out toxins and reduce soreness.
short_description: Firm pressure reaching the deepest layers of muscle and fascia
preparation_notes: Drink plenty of water after. Some soreness for 1-2 days is normal and indicates healing.

name: Hot Stone Massage
description: A relaxing massage where the therapist uses smooth, heated volcanic stones as an extension of their own hands. The heated stones melt away tension and ease sore muscles. This therapy has a lovely sedative effect that can relieve chronic pain, reduce stress and promote deep relaxation.
short_description: Heated volcanic stones that melt tension and ease sore muscles
contraindications: Not suitable for those with skin conditions or circulatory issues

name: Ashiatsu Barefoot Massage
description: Ashiatsu is deep tissue massage in which your massage practitioner uses their feet to perform the therapy. Ashiatsu provides a deep tissue experience that is smooth, deep and less pointed than deep tissue massage with the hands, elbows, knuckles or fists. During Ashiatsu, your massage practitioner uses bars above them and a bench to stand on for support and control of the pressure throughout the massage. The recipient receives all the benefits of a full body deep tissue massage that is safe, relaxing and profound. This modality promotes better posture, relieves painful sore muscles, increases flexibility and promotes circulation.
short_description: Deep tissue using the therapist's feet for smooth and profound pressure

name: Thai Massage
description: Thai massage is practiced on a mat on the floor. It uses lots of supported and fluid stretching movements of the body, almost like passive yoga. As an ancient form of medical therapy, Thai massage works by encouraging the proper flow of the body's energy through its channels. The core premise is that when the body's life force energy is flowing properly the body can maintain its own optimal health, as nature intended.
short_description: Ancient passive yoga on a floor mat — stretching and energy flow
preparation_notes: Please wear comfortable non-restrictive clothing

name: Eastern Massage
description: Head, Face, Neck and Shoulder Release. Blends the art of Japanese facial massage with hypnotic Asian neck and head techniques to relieve stress, balance energy and revitalize facial glow. Lots of hot towels are used to relax the muscles of the back, neck and face. This treatment is especially helpful for those suffering from headaches, TMJ and stress in the shoulder region.
short_description: Japanese-inspired head and neck release for stress and radiance
preparation_notes: Especially helpful for headaches and TMJ

name: Chi Nei Tsang - Abdominal Massage
description: Chi Nei Tsang is an ancient abdominal massage that detoxifies, energizes and retrains our internal organs to work more efficiently. The treatment focuses on the abdominal area, and often releases tension in other parts of the body. It also helps with digestive disorders and overall tension.
short_description: Ancient abdominal massage to detoxify and energize internal organs
contraindications: Not suitable for those who have had abdominal surgery in the past year, are currently menstruating with an IUD, pregnant or actively trying to become pregnant.
preparation_notes: Refrain from eating for 2 hours and drinking for 1 hour before. Wear comfortable loose fitting clothing.

name: Lomi Lomi Hawaiian Massage
description: Lomi Lomi is an ancient form of therapeutic massage that originates from the spiritual traditions of the native Hawaiians. Rooted in the philosophy of the interconnectedness of all things, Lomi Lomi goes beyond just the physical treatment and seeks to harmonize the body, mind, and spirit. It utilizes flowing strokes from one part of the body to another, resembling the gentle waves of the ocean. Therapists often use their forearms and elbows, in addition to their hands, to apply pressure, allowing a broader and more dynamic range of motion.
short_description: Hawaiian sacred bodywork — ocean-like waves harmonizing body and spirit

name: Bamboo Massage
description: A lovely full body oil massage with deep, medium or light pressure. Your therapist will use smooth bamboo sticks of various sizes to warm and release tension in the muscles, ligaments, and joints. Bamboo is the good luck plant. The sticks are rolled across the muscles with rhythmic gliding motions, gradually opening the muscle fibers to ease stress out of the body. An excellent choice for those who enjoy deep tissue massages.
short_description: Smooth bamboo sticks rolled rhythmically to release deep tension

name: Kobido Japanese Facial Massage
description: Ancient Japanese Facial Massage combines deep tissue massage, lymphatic drainage, acupressure, and gentle facial tapping. These techniques stimulate facial muscles, promote blood circulation, and encourage lymphatic flow. One of the primary goals is to prevent and rectify the signs of aging. By toning facial muscles and rejuvenating skin cells, it offers a natural facelift, enhancing skin elasticity and radiance. Beyond the physical benefits, Kobido also focuses on balancing the body's chi, promoting relaxation and a sense of well-being.
short_description: Ancient Japanese facelift — toning muscles and restoring radiance naturally

name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
description: This gentle form of massage uses light, rhythmic strokes and pumping movements in the direction of lymphatic fluid flow. The primary purpose is to promote the drainage of stagnant fluids, detoxify the body, and support a healthy immune system. The lymphatic system is one of the most important systems for your body's health, carrying away waste material so it can be eliminated from the body.
short_description: Gentle rhythmic strokes to drain toxins and boost immunity

name: Craniosacral Therapy
description: A gentle, non-invasive form of alternative bodywork addressing alignment of the bones in the spinal column, head and sacrum. While listening for the rhythm of the Craniosacral fluid, a light holding technique is used along areas of the spine. This presence and intention creates a balance in the pulse of the cerebrospinal fluid flow, giving the body permission to unwind and potentially realign the spine. Can provide relief from migraines, neck and back pain, temporomandibular joint disorders and more.
short_description: Gentle spinal alignment for migraines and deep nervous system relief
preparation_notes: Please wear comfortable non-restrictive clothing

name: Foot Reflexology
description: Foot reflexology is an ancient healing practice based on the principle that the foot, divided into reflex zones, is a mirror image of the entire body. Each reflex zone corresponds to a part of the body. Stimulating these zones can promote health in the corresponding organs and areas of the body through energetic pathways. Your therapist will first clean the lower legs and feet with refreshing salts, essential oils and hot towels. Gentle massage techniques are then applied to the lower legs and feet, followed by varying pressure to specific regions on your feet.
short_description: Ancient healing through the feet — each zone mirrors the whole body

name: Reiki Session
description: Reiki is derived from two Japanese words: rei meaning universal, and ki meaning life energy. Reiki is based on the idea that a universal life energy flows through all living beings, and when this energy becomes disrupted or imbalanced, it can lead to physical, emotional, or spiritual illness. It is an energy balancing technique of laying on of hands offering a non-intrusive way to balance and harmonize the body's energy, promoting a sense of peace, well-being, and vitality.
short_description: Universal energy healing to restore balance and inner peace
preparation_notes: Please wear comfortable non-restrictive clothing

name: Organic Facial
description: Our licensed estheticians are here for your deep cleansing, moisturizing, and rejuvenating needs. We use steamed towels and natural, organic products, not tested on animals and made here in Costa Rica. We begin with a cleanse and exfoliation to rid the skin of dead cells, followed by a variety of facial masks to suit your skin's needs, as well as a deep cleansing or aculift neck and facial massage. Extractions are optional. Complimentary neck massage and scalp massage are included.
short_description: Deep cleansing facial with organic Costa Rican botanicals

name: Organic Body Polish
description: Costa Rican sea salts mixed with essential oils are gently rubbed on the body to stimulate circulation and exfoliate the skin. This treatment concludes with a luxurious and aromatic lavender mint body lotion application, leaving the body soft and silky smooth.
short_description: Sea salt exfoliation leaving skin silky smooth and renewed

name: Detox Body Wrap
description: Your therapist begins by lightly buffing your skin with a soft loofah, then a pure Costa Rican healing blue clay mask will be applied to the whole body, followed by a gentle Cocoon-like wrap to enhance the detoxifying process. After a warm shower to remove the clay, a refreshing and nourishing mint and coconut lotion will be applied to improve the appearance and quality of the skin and reduce inflammation.
short_description: Blue clay cocoon wrap to draw out toxins and restore your glow
preparation_notes: Please wear a bikini

name: Back Body Polish (Add-On)
description: After cleaning your back with salts scented with essential oils and hot towels, you will receive a refreshing application of soothing coconut lotion.
short_description: Salt scrub and coconut lotion for your back

name: Hot Oil Head (Add-On)
description: Scented oil heated with the aromas of lavender and tea tree oil will be drizzled throughout the scalp, followed by relaxing massage techniques on the cranium. Nourishing for the hair and scalp and relieves stress and tension headaches.
short_description: Warm lavender oil scalp massage for tension relief

name: Hands (Add-On)
description: Extra time to release joint and muscle pain in the hands. Perfect for those who work with their hands.
short_description: Release tension in tired hands

name: Feet (Add-On)
description: Extra time on tired and sore feet. A treat for those who spend their days on their feet.
short_description: Extra love for tired feet

name: Face (Add-On)
description: Extra facial massage to relieve headaches or jaw pain. Uplifting and refreshing.
short_description: Soothing facial massage for headaches and jaw tension

name: Abdominals (Add-On)
description: Gentle massage on your abdomen to ease tension and aid digestion.
short_description: Gentle belly massage for stress and digestion

name: Cupping (Add-On)
description: Uses the therapeutic effect of suction pressure to release tension and improve circulation.
short_description: Suction therapy to release deep-held tension

name: Infrared Sauna Session
description: We have a 4 person Clearlight Far infrared sauna which produces heat using Carbon/Ceramic heaters, for an efficient, safe, and healthy way to cleanse the body, lose weight and relax. This infrared technology is more effective as heat reaches deeper into the body than conventional saunas. Deep heat penetration allows removal of toxins, alcohol, nicotine and metals. It helps in curing chronic fatigue, promotes muscle growth, raises growth hormones level, and reduces cellulite.
short_description: Far infrared deep heat for detox and cellular renewal
preparation_notes: Free for guests. Bring a towel.

name: Ice Bath Cold Plunge
description: One person ice chest style cold plunge. Research shows the health benefits of brief cold therapy, including muscle recovery, enhanced circulation, reduced inflammation, lymphatic efficiency, enhanced immune function, stress resilience and elevating mood. The goal is to build up to at least 2 minutes in the cold water and it gets easier each time. It feels incredibly invigorating!
short_description: Brief cold immersion for recovery and invigorating energy
preparation_notes: Free for guests. Build up to 2 minutes. Have towel ready.

name: NormaTec Compression Boots
description: Sequential pulse compression for faster muscle recovery and reduced inflammation after activity or travel.
short_description: Recovery compression for muscles and circulation
contraindications: Deep vein thrombosis or acute inflammation
preparation_notes: Wear comfortable pants or shorts

name: Red Light Therapy Panel
description: Full-body red and near-infrared light for cellular repair and collagen production. Promotes skin health and reduces inflammation at the cellular level.
short_description: LED light therapy for cellular healing and skin vitality
preparation_notes: Remove jewelry. Clean skin preferred.

name: Rife Frequency Session
description: Targeted frequency therapy using Rife technology for wellness support and energetic balancing.
short_description: Frequency-based energetic wellness support

name: Oxygen Bar Session
description: Concentrated oxygen with aromatherapy for energy and mental clarity. A refreshing boost between activities.
short_description: Concentrated oxygen with aromatherapy for a clarity boost

name: Remote Waterfall Hike (Florida Waterfall)
description: In addition to the famous Montezuma Falls right next to our facility, we visit another impressive waterfall twenty minutes from Anamaya. This amazing waterfall is unmarked and rarely visited by tourists. It consists of a long series of pools that drop one into the other, and one large pool with a rope swing. Known as the Florida Waterfall, it's quite a bit easier to walk to for people who aren't able to hike all the way down to Montezuma Falls.
short_description: A hidden jungle waterfall with cascading pools and a rope swing
preparation_notes: Wear hiking shoes. Bring swimwear and water.

name: Horseback Riding
description: Montezuma and Costa Rica are famous for their horse culture. We will put you on horseback to ride down the beach and visit the remote and undeveloped Playa Grande, Playa Cocolito, and El Chorro waterfall that pours off a cliff into the sea. Another great horseback adventure visits the Florida Waterfall. They're two very different trips, each spectacular in its own way.
short_description: Ride horses along pristine beaches to hidden waterfalls
preparation_notes: Wear long pants and closed shoes

name: Canopy Zipline Tour
description: Montezuma's canopy tour zips right past Anamaya on a series of several steel cables. If you're into adrenaline and action, this is an activity you'll love. Perfectly safe, you will find yourself zooming high above the treetops and river below at high speeds, experiencing life as only birds and arboreal creatures usually do. The tour also includes a stop at the waterfall itself, where you'll be given time to swim.
short_description: Soar above the jungle canopy on steel cables at thrilling speeds
preparation_notes: Wear closed-toe shoes. No loose items.

name: Tortuga Island Adventure
description: Fishing, boating, scuba, and snorkeling are all staples of the Montezuma experience. We charter a local boat to provide fun activities in the Costa Rican waters. You may see whales, dolphins, or a sea turtle. Our chef will cook any fish you're able to catch. There's even a small shark or two sleeping in a cave at the snorkeling spot.
short_description: Boat trip with snorkeling and fishing — dolphins and sea life await
contraindications: Must be comfortable in open water
preparation_notes: Bring sunscreen and towel. Lunch included.

name: Playa Hermosa Beach Excursion
description: Playa Hermosa simply means beautiful beach in Spanish, and it's the most gorgeous one in the area. This is a broad, flat, white sand beach with perfect waves and a point break surf spot too. The beach is undeveloped and is picture-perfect with its leaning palms and beach almond trees. Despite its memorable beauty, Playa Hermosa is relatively uncrowded. Many guests love to take photos there at sunset with their reflection in the wet sand.
short_description: A pristine white sand beach with perfect sunset photo opportunities
preparation_notes: Bring camera and swimwear. Great for sunset photos.

name: Beginner Surf Lesson
description: Learn to catch your first waves with certified local surf instructors on Montezuma's beginner-friendly breaks.
short_description: Catch your first wave with expert local guides
preparation_notes: Bring sunscreen and swimwear. Board and rash guard provided.

name: Morning Vinyasa Flow
description: Dynamic sunrise yoga linking breath and movement on the jungle deck overlooking the Pacific Ocean. Start your day feeling energized and connected.
short_description: Energizing sunrise flow on the ocean-view yoga deck
preparation_notes: Included in retreat packages. Bring water.

name: Sunset Yin Yoga
description: Slow deep stretching as the sun sets over the Pacific — deeply calming and restorative. The perfect way to close your day.
short_description: Gentle evening stretches as the sun melts into the ocean
preparation_notes: Props provided. Wear comfortable clothing.

name: Guided Morning Meditation
description: Guided meditation focusing on breath awareness and visualization. Find stillness before the day begins.
short_description: Start your day with stillness and clarity

name: Pranayama & Breathwork
description: Structured breathing techniques for energy and mental clarity. Learn tools you can take home for daily practice.
short_description: Breath mastery for energy and lasting calm
contraindications: Not recommended for severe anxiety without prior consultation

name: Private Yoga Session
description: One-on-one customized yoga session with a certified instructor. Tailored to your goals and body.
short_description: Personalized private instruction tailored to your journey
preparation_notes: Share your goals and any injuries beforehand

name: Costa Rican Cooking Class
description: Learn to prepare traditional Costa Rican dishes using local ingredients. Take the flavors of paradise home with you.
short_description: Cook authentic Tico cuisine with local ingredients
preparation_notes: Inform us of allergies in advance

name: Salsa Dance Lesson
description: Fun group salsa class — no partner or experience needed. Just bring your smile and let the rhythm move you.
short_description: Learn to salsa — no experience needed

name: Tropical Watercolor Painting
description: Paint the jungle views in watercolor with a local artist. All materials provided. Take home your own piece of paradise.
short_description: Paint paradise and take it home with you
preparation_notes: All materials provided

name: Drum Circle
description: Community rhythm session with hand drums and percussion instruments. No experience needed — just feel the beat.
short_description: Join the rhythm and let go
preparation_notes: Drums provided. Bring your own if preferred.

name: Herbal Medicine Workshop
description: Learn about local medicinal plants and make your own herbal remedies to take home.
short_description: Discover the jungle pharmacy and make your own remedies
preparation_notes: Wear clothes that can get stained

name: Scuba Certification (PADI Open Water)
description: Full PADI Open Water Diver certification — classroom + pool + 4 open water dives over 3-4 days. Explore Costa Rica's underwater world with confidence.
short_description: Get your PADI card and explore the deep
preparation_notes: Must be able to swim 200m and tread water 10 min
currency: No flying 24 hours after diving. Medical questionnaire required.

name: Mermaid Course
description: Learn to swim gracefully with a monofin. Includes safety training and underwater photography session.
short_description: Swim like a mermaid — includes underwater photos
preparation_notes: Swimwear required. Monofin provided.

name: Freediving Introduction
description: Breath-hold diving fundamentals — static apnea and dynamic pool training. Discover the freedom of diving on a single breath.
short_description: Discover the freedom of diving on a single breath
contraindications: Must be comfortable in deep water
preparation_notes: No heavy meals 3 hours before

name: Standard Meal Plan
description: Three gourmet meals daily featuring fresh local ingredients — balanced nutrition with creative variety. Organic, nourishing, and delicious.
short_description: Full board balanced meals — fresh and organic daily
preparation_notes: Included in retreat packages

name: Vegan Meal Plan
description: Three fully plant-based meals daily — creative tropical vegan cuisine using fresh Costa Rican produce.
short_description: Full board plant-based meals — vibrant and satisfying
preparation_notes: Included in retreat packages. Notify kitchen of additional allergies.

name: High Protein Meal Plan
description: Three protein-focused meals daily — ideal for active guests and fitness retreats. Extra portions and protein-rich options.
short_description: Full board high-protein meals for active bodies
preparation_notes: Additional charge above standard plan

name: Keto Meal Plan
description: Three low-carb high-fat meals daily — strict keto-compliant menu designed for sustained energy and clarity.
short_description: Full board ketogenic meals for metabolic wellness
preparation_notes: Requires 48-hour advance notice. Additional charge above standard plan.

name: Anamaya Digital Cookbook Membership
description: Access Anamaya's most popular recipes: breakfast, lunch, dinner and more through your own online Cookbook Membership. Includes exclusive health and wellness tools, immune boosting videos, and cooking demonstration videos. Have access to your favorite Anamaya meals at home!
short_description: All our beloved recipes — make Anamaya magic in your own kitchen
preparation_notes: Annual subscription. Digital access.

name: Sacred Cacao Ceremony
description: Traditional ceremonial-grade cacao ritual with intention setting and live music. A heart-opening community experience.
short_description: Heart-opening cacao ritual with music and intention
preparation_notes: Light or no food 2 hours before

name: Private Chef Dinner
description: Custom multi-course dinner prepared by our head chef for your group. An exclusive dining experience under the stars.
short_description: Exclusive multi-course dinner crafted just for you
preparation_notes: Book 48 hours in advance. Share dietary needs.

name: Fresh Smoothie
description: Fresh tropical fruit smoothies and superfood blends made to order.
short_description: Tropical fruit and superfood blends made fresh

name: Professional Photo Session
description: Professional photography session at the resort's most scenic locations — yoga deck, infinity pool, jungle paths, and ocean views.
short_description: Capture your transformation in paradise
preparation_notes: Wear what makes you feel radiant

name: Drone Photography Package
description: Aerial drone photos and video of you at the resort and surrounding coastline. Stunning perspectives you can't get any other way.
short_description: Stunning aerial views of your time in paradise

name: Social Media Content Package
description: Full day of content creation — photo + video optimized for Instagram and TikTok. Leave with ready-to-post content.
short_description: Leave with scroll-stopping content for your socials
preparation_notes: Share your social handles and style preferences beforehand

name: Anamaya T-Shirt
description: Soft organic cotton tee with the Anamaya logo. A piece of paradise to wear home.
short_description: Soft organic cotton souvenir tee

name: Premium Yoga Mat
description: Eco-friendly natural rubber yoga mat — perfect travel companion for your continuing practice.
short_description: Take your practice home on sustainable rubber

name: Crystal Healing Set
description: Curated set of healing crystals — amethyst + rose quartz + clear quartz. Each chosen for its unique energy.
short_description: Handpicked healing crystal trio

name: Organic Coconut Oil
description: Cold-pressed virgin coconut oil sourced locally in Costa Rica. Multi-use for skin and cooking.
short_description: Pure local cold-pressed coconut oil

name: Yoga Anatomy Book
description: Illustrated guide to yoga poses and their anatomical benefits. Deepen your understanding of the body in motion.
short_description: Deepen your practice knowledge

name: $50 Gift Certificate
description: Redeemable for any product or service at the resort. Give someone you love the gift of wellness and renewal.
short_description: Give the gift of wellness — $50

name: $100 Gift Certificate
description: Redeemable for any product or service at the resort. Give someone you love the gift of wellness and renewal.
short_description: Give the gift of wellness — $100

name: $250 Gift Certificate
description: Redeemable for any product or service at the resort. Give someone you love the gift of wellness and renewal.
short_description: Give the gift of wellness — $250

name: Custom Gift Certificate
description: Custom amount gift certificate — specify your amount. The perfect gift for the person who has everything except peace.
short_description: Custom amount — you choose the value

name: Shared Airport Shuttle (SJO)
description: Shared shuttle from San José airport (SJO) to the Montezuma area. Meet fellow travelers on the way.
short_description: Shared ride from SJO to paradise
preparation_notes: Flight number required 48 hours in advance

name: Private Airport Transfer (SJO)
description: Private vehicle from San José airport direct to the resort. Comfortable door-to-door service.
short_description: Door-to-door private comfort from SJO
preparation_notes: Flight details required 48 hours in advance

name: Taxi Boat (Jacó to Montezuma)
description: Fast boat crossing from Jacó/Herradura to Montezuma — skip the long drive around the peninsula.
short_description: Scenic fast boat — skip the drive
preparation_notes: Arrives at Montezuma dock

name: Local Flight (SJO to Tambor)
description: 20-minute scenic flight from San José to Tambor airstrip. Breathtaking aerial views of the coastline.
short_description: Quick scenic flight over the coast
preparation_notes: Luggage limit 25 lbs. Book early — limited seats.

name: 7-Night Yoga Retreat Package
description: Full 7-night package — accommodation + daily yoga + three organic meals + one spa treatment. Everything you need to reset.
short_description: Complete yoga immersion — all-inclusive wellness week
preparation_notes: Select room type at booking

name: Honeymoon Escape
description: 5-night romantic package — private room + couples massage + sunset dinner + professional photo session.
short_description: Romance wrapped in jungle magic
preparation_notes: Must book private room category

name: Wellness Reset Week
description: 7-night wellness package — daily yoga + 3 spa treatments + longevity sessions + premium meal plan. A total mind-body reset.
short_description: Total mind-body reset — arrive exhausted; leave renewed
preparation_notes: Includes wellness consultation on arrival

name: Crystal Sound Bath
description: Immersive sound healing with crystal singing bowls and gongs. Let the vibrations wash through you and dissolve whatever you're holding.
short_description: Deep vibrational healing that dissolves tension
preparation_notes: Bring a blanket and pillow. Wear layers.

name: Full Moon Fire Ceremony
description: Sacred fire circle with intention setting under the full moon. Release what no longer serves you and welcome what's next.
short_description: Release and renew under the full moon
preparation_notes: Check calendar for full moon dates

name: Jungle Wedding Ceremony
description: Intimate wedding or vow renewal ceremony in the jungle with ocean views. Say yes in the most magical setting imaginable.
short_description: Say I do where jungle meets ocean
preparation_notes: Book 3+ months in advance. Planning consultation included.

name: Private Event Space Rental
description: Rent the yoga deck or event pavilion for your private gathering. Surrounded by nature with ocean views.
short_description: Exclusive venue hire in paradise
preparation_notes: Catering available separately

name: Surfboard Rental
description: Quality surfboard rental — shortboard or longboard available. Catch waves at your own pace.
short_description: Grab a board and chase the waves
preparation_notes: Deposit required. Damage policy applies.

name: Stand-Up Paddleboard Rental
description: Stand-up paddleboard for exploring the coastline. Peaceful and scenic.
short_description: Cruise the coast at your own pace
preparation_notes: Life jacket provided

name: Snorkel Gear Rental
description: Mask + snorkel + fins set. Everything you need to explore the reef.
short_description: Explore the underwater world
preparation_notes: Sanitized between uses

name: Bicycle Rental
description: Beach cruiser bike for exploring Montezuma and the surrounding area at your own pace.
short_description: Ride the coast road at your rhythm
preparation_notes: Helmet included. Lock provided.

name: GoPro Rental
description: GoPro Hero with waterproof case and mount accessories. Capture every adventure.
short_description: Capture every adventure underwater and above
preparation_notes: Memory card included. Deposit required.
